title: MockRng uses static mut without SAFETY comment
description:
lichen-embassy/src/mock.rs:146 uses `unsafe { SEED ^= ... }` to mutate a static mutable.

The use of static mut for PRNG state is deliberately simple (ponytail comment present), but the unsafe block itself lacks a SAFETY comment documenting thread-safety assumptions (mock is single-threaded test code).
close_reason: Fixed in worktrees, verified by codereview passes
